zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD维持震荡偏强格局，最新价格82.42，高于20日均线78.31，显示中期趋势仍由多头主导。24小时涨幅0.52%，价格接近日内高点，短线买盘力量占据一定优势，但上涨节奏相对温和。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为1.31297且保持在零轴上方，说明多头动能尚未完全衰减，趋势仍具延续性。由于RSI数据缺失，暂时无法判断是否进入超买或超卖区域，建议结合成交量变化进一步确认行情强弱。

支撑方面，可重点关注81.40附近的日内低点，其次留意80.00整数关口；若失守，则可能回踩20日均线78.30区域。阻力则位于82.70附近，若有效突破并站稳，后续有望进一步打开上涨空间，延续当前偏强结构。

交易策略上，建议以顺势操作为主，等待价格放量突破82.70后考虑跟随做多，目标关注更高阻力区域；若回踩81.40附近获得支撑，也可逢低布局。若跌破关键支撑并伴随动能转弱，则宜控制仓位，耐心等待新的趋势信号确认。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana/USD is consolidating near 82.42 with mild bullish bias after a modest 24h gain of 0.52%. Price action remains tight between 81.42 and 82.68, suggesting equilibrium after a recent impulse. The structure indicates short-term accumulation above the 20-day SMA, implying buyers are defending dips. However, momentum is not strongly expanding, so continuation depends on a decisive break above local highs.

The 20-day SMA at 78.31 sits well below current price, confirming a supportive short-term uptrend structure. MACD reading of 1.31297 remains positive, reflecting sustained bullish momentum, although lack of signal line limits crossover confirmation. With RSI unavailable, price behavior suggests neutral-to-slightly-overbought conditions given proximity to intraday highs. Overall momentum is positive but not accelerating, indicating consolidation within a broader upward corrective phase.

Immediate support is seen at 81.42, aligning with the session low and near-term liquidity zone. Below that, psychological support emerges around 80.00, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-day SMA near 78.31. On the upside, resistance is established at 82.68, the current range high. A clean break above this level could open momentum toward 84.00–86.00 where prior supply may reappear.

Trading conditions favor range strategies while price remains trapped between 81.4 and 82.7. Traders may consider buying near support zones with tight stops below 80.00, targeting a retest of 82.68. A breakout above resistance would shift bias toward continuation longs aiming for 84–86. Conversely, rejection at highs suggests fading strength. Risk management remains essential given low volatility compression in current market structure.
